name: musinsa-md-brief
description: Turns Musinsa global-fashion category growth snippets into a concise MD decision brief.

interface.shortDescription: Structure global-fashion category growth snippets into MD decisions.
interface.longDescription: A skill-only Codex plugin for a Musinsa global-fashion category growth MD responsible for trend-sensitive merchandising decisions. It turns partial commerce signals into facts, questions, hypotheses, options, risks, and verification checks.
defaultPrompt: Create a Musinsa category MD brief from these trend snippets.
Turn these product metrics into MD decision options.
Find missing inputs and brand risks for this category campaign.
